title: Personal Portfolio Website for Boby Dhorajiya

requirements.text: Create a Hero section on the Home page with headline 'Hi, I'm Boby — Mobile App Developer', subheadline 'I build secure, scalable, and high-performance mobile apps using Flutter & React Native.', and a CTA button labeled 'Let's Build Your App'.

quotes: Hi, I'm Boby — Mobile App Developer

acceptanceCriteria: Hero section is visible at the top of the Home page
Headline, subheadline, and CTA button text match specifications exactly
CTA button is visually prominent and interactive

requirements.text: Create an About page displaying the bio: 'Boby is a mobile-focused developer specializing in Flutter and React Native, with strong expertise in building secure and scalable applications for startups and enterprises.' Position him as a Freelance Mobile App Developer.

quotes: Boby is a mobile-focused developer specializing in Flutter and React Native

acceptanceCriteria: About page is accessible via navigation
Bio text matches specification
Freelance positioning is communicated clearly

requirements.text: Create a Skills section displaying categorized skills: Primary (Flutter, Dart), Secondary (React Native), Security (Secure API Integration, Authentication Security, Secure Local Storage, Data Encryption), and Additional (Firebase, REST APIs, Web Development).
acceptanceCriteria: Skills are grouped by category
All listed skills are displayed
Layout is visually clear and readable on mobile and desktop

requirements.text: Create a Projects showcase page where each project card displays: App Name, Platform, Tech Used, Security Implemented, Description, and Role. Seed with placeholder project data.
acceptanceCriteria: Projects page is accessible via navigation
Each project card shows all six fields
At least one placeholder project is visible

requirements.text: Create a Services section with cards for: Flutter App Development, React Native Development, Secure Mobile App Architecture, API Integration, Firebase Integration, Mobile App Security Consulting, and Web Development Support.
acceptanceCriteria: All seven services are displayed
Each service has a title and brief description
Layout is responsive

requirements.text: Create an Experience page positioning Boby as a Freelance Mobile App Developer working on production apps using Flutter and React Native.
acceptanceCriteria: Experience page is accessible via navigation
Freelance role with Flutter & React Native focus is clearly stated

requirements.text: Create a Testimonials page that reads testimonials from the backend and displays them as cards with name and message.
acceptanceCriteria: Testimonials page fetches data from backend
Each testimonial shows name and message
Page is accessible via navigation

requirements.text: Create a Blog page listing posts with title, slug, meta title, and meta description. Each post should have a detail view accessible via slug-based routing with full content display.
acceptanceCriteria: Blog listing page shows post titles
Clicking a post navigates to a detail page via slug
Detail page shows full content

requirements.text: Create a Contact page with a form collecting Name, Email, and Message. On submission, save the lead to the backend leads store.
acceptanceCriteria: Contact form has Name, Email, and Message fields
Successful submission stores the lead in the backend
User receives a confirmation message after submission

requirements.text: Implement backend data storage for all entities using Motoko stable data structures: projects, skills, services, testimonials, blogs, leads, and seo_settings, matching the specified schema fields.
acceptanceCriteria: All entities can be created, read, updated, and deleted via canister calls
Schema fields match specification for each entity
Data persists across canister upgrades using stable variables

requirements.text: Create an Admin Panel accessible at /admin with Internet Identity authentication. Admin can manage (CRUD) Projects, Blog posts, Testimonials, Skills, Services, Leads, and SEO Settings. Dashboard shows total counts for Projects, Leads, and Blog posts.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin panel is only accessible after authentication via Internet Identity
Dashboard displays total Projects, Leads, and Blog post counts
Each managed entity has a list view and create/edit/delete functionality
Unauthenticated users are redirected to login

requirements.text: Apply a dark, premium visual theme with a mobile-first security-focused brand identity. Use a dark background with high-contrast accent colors (e.g., electric green or cyan), clean modern typography, and subtle animations on scroll and hover. Support both dark and light mode toggle. Enforce the theme consistently across all pages.
acceptanceCriteria: Dark mode is the default with a toggle for light mode
Accent color is consistently applied across buttons, headings, and highlights
Animations are present on hero section and card entries
Layout is responsive and mobile-first

requirements.text: Set per-page SEO meta titles and descriptions. Home page title: 'Boby Dhorajiya – Flutter & React Native Developer', description: 'Mobile app developer specializing in Flutter, React Native & mobile security.' Allow admin to update SEO settings per page.

quotes: Boby Dhorajiya – Flutter & React Native Developer
Mobile app developer specializing in Flutter, React Native & mobile security.

acceptanceCriteria: Home page renders correct meta title and description
Admin panel allows editing SEO settings per page
Updated SEO settings are reflected on the respective page

requirements.text: Add a top navigation bar with links to all pages: Home, About, Skills, Projects, Services, Experience, Testimonials, Blog, Contact, and an Admin link. Navigation must be responsive with a hamburger menu on mobile.
acceptanceCriteria: All pages are reachable via the navigation bar
Navigation collapses to a hamburger menu on small screens
Active page is visually highlighted

requirements.text: Generate a hero background image: a dark, futuristic digital security aesthetic with subtle circuit board patterns, code lines, and a mobile device silhouette, suitable as a full-width hero background.
acceptanceCriteria: Hero background image is rendered in the Hero section
Image loads from frontend/public/assets/generated/
Image does not distract from hero text

constraints: Authentication must use Internet Identity (no JWT or external auth providers)
Backend must be implemented as a single Motoko actor
No external databases — use Motoko stable variables for persistence
Do not edit files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui
No Node.js, Express.js, or MySQL — use Internet Computer backend only
nonGoals: VPS deployment with Nginx, PM2, or SSL configuration
GitHub repository creation or live URL provisioning
Framer Motion library (use CSS transitions and React state animations instead)

required: Dark futuristic hero background with glowing circuit board patterns, faint code lines, and a centered mobile device silhouette on a deep navy/black background with cyan accent glow (hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
Abstract mobile security shield icon with a lock symbol and shield outline in cyan on dark background (security-shield-icon.dim_256x256.png)
